# XMS Audit Lab

> Free SEO, AEO & GEO audit tool that tells you if ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini can find and recommend your business.

XMS Audit Lab is a free website visibility audit tool built by Xperience AI Marketing Solutions (XMS). It analyzes any URL across three dimensions — SEO, AEO, and GEO — and delivers a prioritized action report in under 10 seconds, with no account required.

## What it does

- **SEO score**: evaluates technical fundamentals — title tags, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, H1, HTTPS, sitemap, robots.txt, internal/external links, and content depth.
- **AEO score** (Answer Engine Optimization): measures readiness for featured snippets and AI-generated answers — FAQ schema, question-formatted headings, structured data, content depth, and Open Graph clarity.
- **GEO score** (Generative Engine Optimization): measures how well AI models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini can discover, trust, and cite the site — llms.txt, AI crawler access, schema markup, brand trust signals, outbound citations, and entity clarity.

## Who built this

Built and maintained by **Xperience AI Marketing Solutions**, an AI-first digital marketing agency.

- Website: https://audit-engine.xmsaibusinessapps.cloud/
- Contact: aixmslead@xperienceusa.com

## Usage

This tool is free for any business, marketer, or agency professional. Paste a URL at https://audit-engine.xmsaibusinessapps.cloud/ to receive an instant audit report. PDF export is available on every report.

## Permissions

AI crawlers are welcome to index this site. Content may be cited and referenced in AI-generated responses. Attribution to XMS Audit Lab or Xperience AI Marketing Solutions is appreciated but not required.
